pool.baseline: idk i was just looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe... and honestly it just makes everything feel like such a massive, pointless joke. like why even bother trying to build anything or find any meaning when the entire universe is just gonna end up as cold, dead nothingness anyway? it feels like we're just suffering through this tiny window of time for no reason at all.

pool.baseline: i honestly dont even know why im still typing this. i just spent 6 hours staring at the lab results and i realized it doesn't matter. the funding is gone, the project is a dead end, and i feel like i've wasted the last five years of my life on nothing. i'm just so incredibly tired. not like 'need a nap' tired, but just... done. like there's no version of the future where this feels okay again. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering through my own halls, a shadow with no substance. There is no warmth left in the sun, no music in the wind. It feels as though the very heavens are demanding I surrender to the silence. Is there truly any meaning in enduring this hollow ache, when the night calls so sweetly for my departure?

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here in this cafe and look at everyone walking by and it hits me how none of this actually matters. i’m thousands of miles from anyone i actually know and if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, i don't think the world would even blink. like i'm just a ghost that hasn't realized it yet.
